title: paspalum dilatatum
intro: Paspalum dilatatum, also known as the tall grass paspalum, is a type of perennial grass native to South America. The medicinal properties of Paspalum dilatatum include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive health. Paspalum dilatatum can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
